title: YAMI-096 Behind the scenes of a married woman and life insurance lady.The cliff-edge choices she makes before getting a contract.
description: I called the life insurance lady under the terms of the contract. Just the two of us in a different place than usual... He could have refused, but was he prepared for not doing so? As a married woman, she is in a position where she is not allowed to find out, but the married woman's sensitive body does not know that it is a trap...
